notes: AnswerOption: 4 visual states (idle/selected-correct/selected-incorrect/revealed-correct/dimmed), 44px touch targets, disabled after selection.
ExplanationPanel: result badge (green/red), fast-tap warning only when isFastTap=true, explanation box, Next button.
QuestionCard: markQuestionDisplayed on mount, reads questionDisplayTime from store at answer time, recordAnswer+setSelectedIndex on selection, nextQuestion+onDone on Next click.
SessionSummary: 5-state distribution from store.questions, session answered count from queue.length, Start New Session button.

StudyTab: manages activeQuestion in local state to prevent mid-explanation question changes, useEffect on sessionId for new session init, handleQuestionDone advances question after nextQuestion() called.
Build output: 142.49 kB JS (45.74 kB gzip), 3.15 kB CSS — well within 5MB budget.
